# House Of Kanti

> Handcrafted Ayurvedic skincare — ubtan, face masks, soaps, oils and gift hampers, inspired by timeless botanical wisdom.

House Of Kanti is a holistic skincare sanctuary rooted in Ayurveda. The brand crafts clean, plant-based, high-performance rituals using ingredients like saffron, sandalwood, turmeric, rose and Himalayan clay. Orders are placed online with WhatsApp and Razorpay checkout; shipping is free above ₹999.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview, signature products and gift hampers.
- [About](/about): Brand philosophy, vision, hero ingredients and signature collection.

## Products

- Kanti Ubtan — The Natural Cleanser
- Kanti Face Pack — The Detox Ritual
- Kanti Kumkumadi Night Oil — The Overnight Elixir (15 ml)
- Kanti Kumkumadi Night Gel — The Overnight Elixir (50 gm)
- Kanti Kumkumadi Night Combo — The Overnight Elixir
- Kanti Bath Salt — The Spa Sanctuary
- Kanti Ancient Glow Soap
